question_text: Which of the following is an irreversible change?

options.label: A
options.text: Melting an ice cube to form liquid water

options.label: B
options.text: Burning wood to form ash and gases

options.label: C
options.text: Dissolving sugar in water to make a solution

options.label: D
options.text: Evaporating salt water to separate salt and water

correct_answer: B) Burning wood to form ash and gases
explanation: Burning is an irreversible change because it creates new substances (ash, carbon dioxide, and other gases) through a chemical reaction. The original wood cannot be recovered, unlike melting or dissolving which are reversible physical changes.
